# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
      tier: "Standard"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    properties:
      accessTier: "Hot"
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      networkAcls:
        bypass: "AzureServices"
        defaultAction: "Deny"
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      blobServices:
        - properties:
            cors:
              - allowedOrigins: ["*"]
                allowedMethods: ["GET", "HEAD"]
                maxAgeInSeconds: 3600
                exposedHeaders: []
                allowedHeaders: ["*"]
            deleteRetentionPolicy:
              enabled: false
              days: 0
            isVersioningEnabled: false
            logging:
              delete: false
              read: true
              write: true
              retentionPolicy:
                enabled: false
                days: 0
            minuteMetrics:
              enabled: false
              retentionPolicy:
                enabled: false
                days: 0
            hourMetrics:
              enabled: false
              retentionPolicy:
                enabled: false
                days: 0
            versioningEnabled: false
            publicAccess: "Blob"

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the storage account. Must be between 3 and 24 characters in length and can contain only lowercase letters and numbers."
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The location where the storage account will be created."
